properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've heard its just a fable Some old stories handed down And the bible has no meaning for today But it was there within those pages That I met the rock of ages And ever since He changed my heart, I say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: From Genesis to Revelation, every word of God is true A light to every generation tried and tested through and through The hope of all who died believing The greatest story ever heard The Holy Bible still remains the final word

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The greatest volumes written Don't contain the kind of power I discover when I read God's word to me It's my answer for each question And my fears are laid to rest On this precious book that says what I believe

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will live my life to honor every word And I will lay it down for every chapter, every verse

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The hope of all who died believing The greatest story ever heard The holy bible still remains the final word

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The holy bible still remains the final word
